description: In the Bologna Acosta scenario (~/SUMO_Scenarios/bologna_acosta/), municipal planners are evaluating a circulation plan that involves converting a two-way street into a one-way street. Based on the edge ID specified in circulation_plan.txt, produce a modified network file named acosta_oneway.net.xml (derived from acosta_buslanes.net.xml) and updated traffic routes in acosta_oneway.rou.xml. Create a simulation configuration named run_oneway.sumocfg, identical in structure to run.sumocfg but referencing the new network and route files, and execute the simulation to generate trip information in tripinfos_oneway.xml.
